pageContent:
Ravi Kant Singh
+91-6396180310
Software Engineer raysk7161gmail.com
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Company: EPAM Systems Inc. Gurgaon, India
Sr. Software Engineer Oct 2023 - Present
Developed internal tools to automate the assignment of Harmonized Tariff Schedule (HTS)
codes to products, reducing manual classification effort and minimizing error rates.
Implemented the Classy AI Assistant, a conversational AI interface powered by RAG,
LangChain and LlamaIndex, enabling HTS code recommendations and supporting natural
language queries for operations like reporting, analytics, and task assignments.
Enabled prompt-based interactions, allowing users to perform tasks like “Show me last week’s
unclassified articles” and generate custom reports directly via the assistant.
Improved frontend performance by adding caching layers, reducing API latency, and enhancing
the user experience.
Optimized application build using lazy loading and code-splitting, leading to a 10%
performance boost and 20% reduction in bundle size.

Company: Tesit Technologies Inc. Miami, Florida (Remote)
Software Engineer Feb 2021-Oct 2023

Developed Teasit.com (PWA) with outstanding performance to 99% and 100% search engine
optimization - SEO (Lighthouse Score) in Next.js and Mongodb as Database
Build a micro-service capable of handling the heavy video processing load for over 10k+ users
in FFmpeg and Nodejs. Implemented Dockerize Container and created K8s services for
auto-scaling on demand.
Created an AI Tool responsible for auto-tagging videos on the platform based on their content
using AWS Kinesis and Nodejs.
Worked on a few core features in-app like Feed, In-app Video Editor, and Messenger in React
Set up and created custom GitHub actions in CI/CD to manage multiple things.

Company: Envirya Technologies Pvt. Ltd. Gurgaon, India
Software Engineer Aug 2019-Feb 2021
Built a lightweight, customizable form builder from scratch in React Native.
Led and mentored a team of 5 engineers across multiple projects.
Developed an IVRS-based tool mapping users to MSMEs based on pin codes using React
Native, Node.js, and MongoDB.
Created custom background services with cron jobs and internal management tools using
Node.js, MySQL, and MongoDB.
github/raysk4ever www.socialamigo.in

SKILLS
LlamaIndex, LangChain, LLM Integration, FFmpeg, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, React Native,
Node.js, Express, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, Material UI, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Firebase, AWS
(Lambda, S3, Bedrock, Knowledge Base), GCP (Looker), Docker, Kubernetes, Nginx, Git, CI/CD,
WebSockets, REST APIs, GraphQL, Three.js, Prompt Engineering, OpenAI APIs, AI Chatbot
Development

PROJECTS
Classy AI Assistant – Customs Classification Project (adidas)
Project Focus: AI-Driven Automation & Operational Intelligence
●
●
●
●
Spearheaded the development of Classy AI Assistant, a smart chat-based tool designed to
assist customs teams in classifying products with accurate HTS code recommendations,
improving speed and consistency.
Built a natural language interface that enables users to generate real-time reports, query
classification statuses, and perform routine operations like task reassignment and retriggering
jobs — all through simple prompts.
Engineered performance enhancements through frontend caching and lazy-loaded modules,
delivering a noticeably faster user experience and reducing reliance on backend queries.
The project significantly reduced manual classification errors, boosted operational efficiency,
and showcased the power of AI in automating high-volume, rule-based business tasks.
Teasit – Progressive Web App (PWA) for Video Sharing
Project Focus: High-Performance Web Platform with AI-Powered Features
●
●
●
●
●
Led the end-to-end development of Teasit.com, a modern Progressive Web App (PWA)
featuring blazing-fast performance, SEO optimization, and AI-based enhancements for a
next-gen video-sharing experience.
Achieved a 99% Lighthouse Performance Score and 100% SEO Score, ensuring instant load
times, high discoverability, and exceptional user experience across devices.
Built a dedicated microservice for video processing, enabling scalable and efficient handling of
uploads, compression, and streaming logic.
Integrated an AI-driven auto-tagging system to automatically classify video content and boost
searchability and user retention.
Rolled out advanced engagement features such as personalized feeds, an in-app video editor,
and a real-time messaging module, increasing user interaction and retention metrics.
github/raysk4ever www.socialamigo.in
